ucs.title: [LLM] Cl0p LEMURLOOT webshell drop on MOVEit Transfer (CVE-2023-34362)
ucs.description: Hunts the canonical Cl0p / TA505 / FIN11 (GRACEFUL SPIDER) signature from the May-2023 MOVEit campaign: w3wp.exe under the MOVEitDMZ_AppPool dropping LEMURLOOT artefacts (human2.aspx, human2.aspx.lnk, msrcl3.dll, app_web_*.dll) into the MOVEit Transfer wwwroot, or that webshell spawning a Windows shell. This is THE Cl0p tradecraft Microsoft tracks as Lace Tempest / Storm-0950 and CrowdStrike as GRACEFUL SPIDER.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where Filesystem.file_path="*\\MOVEit Transfer\\wwwroot\\*" AND (Filesystem.file_name IN ("human2.aspx","human2.aspx.lnk","msrcl3.dll") OR (Filesystem.file_name="app_web_*.dll" AND Filesystem.process_name="w3wp.exe")) by Filesystem.dest Filesystem.user Filesystem.process_name Filesystem.file_name Filesystem.file_path Filesystem.file_hash | `drop_dm_object_name(Filesystem)` | append [| tstats summariesonly=true count from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name="w3wp.exe" AND Processes.parent_process="*MOVEitDMZ_AppPool*" AND Processes.process_name IN ("cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cscript.exe","wscript.exe","bitsadmin.exe","certutil.exe") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process Processes.process_name Processes.process | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)`] | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
ucs.kql:
let LemurLootArtifacts = dynamic(["human2.aspx","human2.aspx.lnk","msrcl3.dll"]);
let MoveItHosts = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(30d)
    | where InitiatingProcessCommandLine has "MOVEitDMZ_AppPool"
       or ProcessCommandLine has "MOVEit Transfer"
    | summarize by DeviceId;
let WebshellDrops =
    DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where ActionType == "FileCreated"
    | where FolderPath has @"\MOVEit Transfer\wwwroot\"
        or FolderPath has @"\MOVEit Transfer\"
    | where FileName in~ (LemurLootArtifacts)
        or (FileName endswith ".aspx" and InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "w3wp.exe")
        or (FileName startswith "app_web_" and FileName endswith ".dll" and InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "w3wp.exe")
    | project Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, FileName, FolderPath, SHA256,
              InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
              InitiatingProcessAccountName, Signal="LemurLootDrop";
let WebshellSpawn =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "w3wp.exe"
    | where InitiatingProcessCommandLine has "MOVEitDMZ_AppPool"
         or InitiatingProcessFolderPath has @"\MOVEit Transfer\"
    | where FileName in~ ("cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cscript.exe","wscript.exe","bitsadmin.exe","certutil.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","whoami.exe","hostname.exe")
    | project Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
              InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
              AccountName, Signal="WebshellChildProc";
union WebshellDrops, WebshellSpawn
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let LemurLootArtifacts = dynamic(["human2.aspx","human2.aspx.lnk","msrcl3.dll"]);
let WebshellDrops =
    ImFileEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventType == "FileCreated"
    | where TargetFilePath has @"\MOVEit Transfer\wwwroot\"
        or TargetFilePath has @"\MOVEit Transfer\"
    | where TargetFileName in~ (LemurLootArtifacts)
        or (TargetFileName endswith ".aspx" and ActingProcessName has "w3wp.exe")
        or (TargetFileName startswith "app_web_" and TargetFileName endswith ".dll" and ActingProcessName has "w3wp.exe")
    | project TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, TargetFileName, TargetFilePath,
              TargetFileSHA256, ActingProcessName, ActingProcessCommandLine,
              ActorUsername, Signal="LemurLootDrop";
let WebshellSpawn =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where ParentProcessName endswith "w3wp.exe"
    | where CommandLine has "MOVEitDMZ_AppPool" or ParentProcessName has @"\MOVEit Transfer\"
    | where NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\cmd.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\powershell.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\pwsh.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\cscript.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\wscript.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\bitsadmin.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\certutil.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\net.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\whoami.exe"
    | project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, NewProcessName, CommandLine,
              ParentProcessName, Signal="WebshellChildProc";
union isfuzzy=true WebshellDrops, WebshellSpawn
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Cl0p LEMURLOOT Webshell Drop on MOVEit Transfer (CVE-2023-34362)
id: 7f3c8b2a-9d54-4a71-bd18-1c0ab2f4ec55
status: stable
description: Detects creation of LEMURLOOT (human2.aspx / msrcl3.dll) webshell artefacts in MOVEit Transfer wwwroot, the canonical Cl0p / FIN11 / GRACEFUL SPIDER tradecraft from the 2023 MOVEit mass-exploitation campaign.
references:
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa23-158a
  - https://www.mandiant.com/resources/blog/zero-day-moveit-data-theft
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2023/06/07
tags:
  - attack.initial_access
  - attack.t1190
  - attack.persistence
  - attack.t1505.003
  - detection.emerging_threats
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_path:
    TargetFilename|contains: '\MOVEit Transfer\wwwroot\'
  selection_artifact:
    TargetFilename|endswith:
      - '\human2.aspx'
      - '\human2.aspx.lnk'
      - '\msrcl3.dll'
  selection_appweb:
    Image|endswith: '\w3wp.exe'
    TargetFilename|contains: '\app_web_'
    TargetFilename|endswith: '.dll'
  condition: selection_path and (selection_artifact or selection_appweb)
falsepositives:
  - Authorised Progress MOVEit patch deployment (rare and announced)
level: critical
ucs.rationale: Cl0p is uniquely defined by mass MFT zero-days; LEMURLOOT (human2.aspx + msrcl3.dll under MOVEit\\wwwroot, dropped by w3wp.exe in MOVEitDMZ_AppPool) is a publicly documented Cl0p-only artefact (CISA AA23-158A, Mandiant UNC4857). No other actor cluster has been observed using these exact filenames in this exact path on MOVEit hosts, so the FP rate is essentially zero outside of vendor patch activit

ucs.title: [LLM] Cl0p Cleo Harmony/VLTrader/LexiCom MFT exploitation (CVE-2024-50623 / CVE-2024-55956)
ucs.description: Hunts Cl0p's December-2024 mass-exploitation of Cleo MFT products: the Cleo Java service (LexiCom / VLTrader / Harmony) writing autorun XML payloads or spawning powershell.exe / cmd.exe to stage Malichus / Cl0p loaders. Mirrors the GoAnywhere (CVE-2023-0669) and Accellion FTA TTP that defines TA505 / FIN11.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.parent_process_name IN ("java.exe","javaw.exe") AND (Processes.parent_process="*Cleo*" OR Processes.parent_process="*Harmony*" OR Processes.parent_process="*VLTrader*" OR Processes.parent_process="*LexiCom*")) AND Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","cscript.exe","wscript.exe","bitsadmin.exe","certutil.exe") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.parent_process Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.process_hash | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | append [| tstats summariesonly=true count from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where (Filesystem.file_path IN ("*\\Cleo\\*","*\\Harmony\\autorun\\*","*\\VLTrader\\autorun\\*","*\\LexiCom\\autorun\\*")) AND (Filesystem.file_name="healthchecktemplate.txt" OR Filesystem.file_name="healthcheck.txt" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.xml" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.jar") AND Filesystem.process_name IN ("java.exe","javaw.exe") by Filesystem.dest Filesystem.file_name Filesystem.file_path Filesystem.process_name] | `drop_dm_object_name(Filesystem)` | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
ucs.kql:
let CleoPaths = dynamic([@"\Cleo\",@"\Harmony\",@"\VLTrader\",@"\LexiCom\"]);
let ShellBins = dynamic(["powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","cscript.exe","wscript.exe","bitsadmin.exe","certutil.exe"]);
let CleoSpawn =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("java.exe","javaw.exe")
    | where InitiatingProcessCommandLine has_any ("Cleo","Harmony","VLTrader","LexiCom")
         or InitiatingProcessFolderPath has_any (CleoPaths)
    | where FileName in~ (ShellBins)
    | extend B64 = extract(@"(?i)(?:-(?:e(?:nc(?:odedcommand)?)?))\s+([A-Za-z0-9+/=]{20,})", 1, ProcessCommandLine)
    | extend Decoded = iff(isnotempty(B64), base64_decode_tostring(B64), "")
    | project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
              Parent = InitiatingProcessFileName,
              ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
              ParentPath = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
              Child = FileName,
              ChildCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
              Decoded,
              Signal = "CleoJavaShellSpawn";
let CleoAutorunDrop =
    DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where ActionType == "FileCreated"
    | where FolderPath has_any (CleoPaths)
    | where FolderPath has "autorun"
         or FileName in~ ("healthchecktemplate.txt","healthcheck.txt")
         or FileName endswith ".jar"
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("java.exe","javaw.exe")
    | project Timestamp, DeviceName, FileName, FolderPath, SHA256,
              InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
              InitiatingProcessAccountName, Signal = "CleoAutorunDrop";
union CleoSpawn, CleoAutorunDrop
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let CleoPaths = dynamic([@"\Cleo\",@"\Harmony\",@"\VLTrader\",@"\LexiCom\"]);
let CleoSpawn =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where ParentProcessName endswith "\\java.exe" or ParentProcessName endswith "\\javaw.exe"
    | where ParentProcessName has_any ("Cleo","Harmony","VLTrader","LexiCom")
    | where NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\powershell.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\pwsh.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\cmd.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\mshta.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\rundll32.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\regsvr32.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\cscript.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\wscript.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\bitsadmin.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\certutil.exe"
    | extend B64 = extract(@"(?i)(?:-(?:e(?:nc(?:odedcommand)?)?))\s+([A-Za-z0-9+/=]{20,})", 1, CommandLine)
    | extend Decoded = iff(isnotempty(B64), base64_decode_tostring(B64), "")
    | project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, ParentProcessName,
              NewProcessName, CommandLine, Decoded, Signal="CleoJavaShellSpawn";
let CleoAutorunDrop =
    ImFileEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventType == "FileCreated"
    | where TargetFilePath has_any (CleoPaths)
    | where TargetFilePath has "autorun"
         or TargetFileName in~ ("healthchecktemplate.txt","healthcheck.txt")
         or TargetFileName endswith ".jar"
    | where ActingProcessName has_any ("java.exe","javaw.exe")
    | project TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, TargetFileName, TargetFilePath,
              TargetFileSHA256, ActingProcessName, ActingProcessCommandLine,
              ActorUsername, Signal="CleoAutorunDrop";
union isfuzzy=true CleoSpawn, CleoAutorunDrop
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Cl0p Cleo Harmony/VLTrader/LexiCom Java Process Spawning Shell
id: 4d8e22c1-1b62-4f69-8a90-2a7c4ff89b30
status: experimental
description: Detects the Cleo MFT Java service (LexiCom / VLTrader / Harmony) spawning a Windows shell or LOLBin - a Cl0p / TA505 / FIN11 hallmark following CVE-2024-50623 / CVE-2024-55956 mass exploitation in late 2024.
references:
  - https://www.huntress.com/blog/threat-advisory-oh-no-cleo-cleo-software-actively-being-exploited-in-the-wild
  - https://www.rapid7.com/blog/post/2024/12/11/etr-cve-2024-50623-cleo-file-transfer-zero-day-exploitation
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2024/12/11
tags:
  - attack.initial_access
  - attack.t1190
  - attack.execution
  - attack.t1059.001
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  parent:
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\java.exe'
      - '\javaw.exe'
    ParentCommandLine|contains:
      - 'Cleo'
      - 'Harmony'
      - 'VLTrader'
      - 'LexiCom'
  child:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\mshta.exe'
      - '\rundll32.exe'
      - '\regsvr32.exe'
      - '\cscript.exe'
      - '\wscript.exe'
      - '\bitsadmin.exe'
      - '\certutil.exe'
  condition: parent and child
falsepositives:
  - Cleo product upgrade scripts invoking PowerShell (rare, scoped to maintenance windows)
level: high
ucs.rationale: Cl0p's defining tradecraft is exploiting MFT zero-days (Accellion FTA 2020-21, GoAnywhere CVE-2023-0669, MOVEit CVE-2023-34362, PaperCut, Cleo CVE-2024-50623/55956). The Cleo Java service has no legitimate reason to spawn powershell.exe, cmd.exe or LOLBins, and Huntress / Rapid7 / Mandiant publicly attributed the December-2024 Cleo wave to Cl0p. Pairing Java parent + Cleo install path + shell chil
